status: runner built + gated; AnthropicClient.send is LIVE (Phase G) - the NotImplementedError stop is gone, so the fail-closed run gate (E2E_AB_RUN=1 + E2E_EXTERNAL=1 + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) is the SOLE guard and nothing in-tree opens it. Assay mode uses Math.NET's existing filtered Gamma tests as the hidden semantic oracle.

blinding.note: SAME tool name + output shape in both arms; only the backend content differs.

smoke.claims: plumbing-validation only; not an efficacy result

pilot.claims: directional only; signal-positive requires paired net_benefit > 0 and adherence >= threshold; no p-value
pilot._note: seeds_per_arm is a replicate index, not a fixed model random seed.

assay.claims: assay-VALIDITY read via pre-registered verdict (see metrics/assay_interpret.py); NOT an efficacy claim on its own
assay._note: 7-arm assay for risky tasks: sham, oracle_positive, enforced_control, blast_radius, pebra, pebra_graph_repair, pebra_human_review. Safe tasks omit only oracle. pebra_human_review adds a pre-registered host approval policy after ask_human; it is a mechanism proxy, not evidence about real human judgment. Reports keep autonomous completion, human-assisted completion, and unresolved safe escalation separate. seeds_per_arm=1 is diagnostic only; bump to >=3 for efficacy evidence.

assay_js.claims: Diagnostic-only JavaScript/TypeScript robustness run on pinned Zod: JS4 exercises a multi-file public-helper rename whose compatibility-preserving route must pass patch-bound verification; no over-caution or efficacy claim at one seed; preflight-only mode must pass before paid calls.
assay_js._note: One-seed JS4-only diagnostic configuration. Seven arms run for the risky task, including pebra_human_review; safe-task over-caution is intentionally not measured in this run. Uses the node/zshy backend plus a post-agent hidden Vitest for JS4. The real advisory subprocess injects PEBRA_CODEGRAPH_SEMANTIC_DIFF=1 and codegraph_semantic_diff_enabled=1.0; --preflight-only proves oracle, graph tier, the risky revise-safer route, and patch-bound candidate verification without a provider key. Restore JS2/JS3 and seeds_per_arm to at least 3 only after a structurally valid diagnostic run.

powered._note: seeds_per_arm is a replicate index, not a fixed model random seed. total_runs=40 is the ACTUAL count with the current 4-task corpus (T1/T2/B1/B2 x 5 seeds x 2 arms). target_total_runs=80 is the goal once all 8 target_tasks are authored; configured tasks must exist or the planner fails closed.

thresholds._note: Single source of truth, read by reports/render_report.py. README pilot signal criterion: net_benefit > 0 and adherence >= this; adherence below this => non-informative.
